title: A Spartans Face?
description: In the beta release of Halo 3 multiplayer mode, if you angle the camera just right while on a mongoose, you can clip through the Spartan's helmet and it'll show a face underneath. Which is the image of Marcus Lehto, Bungie's creative director from 1997 to 2012.

title: Load Screen Message
description: Whilst your on the loading screen on December 25th (Christmas Day), if you press down on both thumbsticks a wider view of teh Halo Ring will display and if you look closely you can make out 'Happy Birthday, Lauren!' displayed on the rings surface.
